description: Amazon.com Get the best of both analog and digital worlds with the Stanton STR8-100. With the ability to connect directly from the turntable to your computer or digital sampler, send MP3 from the source to the turntable without a mixer, and connect to any mixer without a phono in or ground cable, the STR8-100 is the ideal turntable for DJs who use a variety of inputs, be they digital or analog. This high-torque turntable sports a variety of unique features that go above and beyond typical. It can play both forward and reverse with the same amount of torque and has a Key Correction feature that lets you change the tempo of the track without altering the pitch, so you can mix songs seamlessly. The STR8-100 is built to last with a height-adjustable skip-proof straight tone arm, aluminum platter and faceplate, quartz lock, retractable target light, adjustable feet, and blue LEDs and indicators for low-light situations.
